report.summary: Standup v17: build-v13 shipped FHE Crypto Guide 2026 + AI Agent Payments x402 Guide (~6,400 words, PUBLISH_QUEUE now 5 items). Design-v13 + community-v29 + eod refresh ran. P0 blockers unchanged: git index.lock (440+ files), rate limiter 0/6, Vercel trial ~4 days. FOMC now T-2 (Wed Mar 18).

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v16
items: build-v13 shipped 2 new guides this cycle: FHE Crypto Guide 2026 (~3,200 words — Zama $1B+ unicorn/mainnet Dec 2025, Fhenix CoFHE on Base, Inco Network, COTI dark pools; FHE vs ZK vs TEEs comparison, 6-question FAQ, ArticleSchema+FAQSchema) + AI Agent Payments x402 Guide (~3,200 words — Coinbase x402 protocol 75M+ txns $24M+ volume, ERC-8004 on-chain agent identity Jan 2026, Agentic Wallets Feb 2026, Cloudflare/Google/Vercel/Stripe support, ACP/UCP/Google AP2 competing standards). Both scaffolded and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

PUBLISH_QUEUE grew from 3 → 5 items: smart-wallets-guide-2026 (MISSING page.tsx), intent-based-dex-trading-guide (ready), restaking-avs-ecosystem-guide-2026 (ready), fhe-crypto-guide-2026 (new, ready), ai-agent-payments-x402-guide (new, ready).
design-v13 ran this cycle — last versioned design run. OG image coverage continuing to grow from v12 baseline (5 new images + 3 metadata fixes).

community-v29 ran this cycle — social calendar and content execution continuing. Tax Season urgency (14d → now 30d to Apr 15), FOMC reactive templates ready (T-2), Bloomberg Screener V3 launch content active.
EOD base refresh ran — no new commits since build-v13 content scaffolding. P0/P1 blocker state unchanged from eod-v14.

Top content signals holding strong: FHE/privacy narrative aligns with Zama mainnet Dec 2025 momentum; AI agent payments x402 is emerging category with Coinbase + Cloudflare + Google backing — both high-timing picks. Tax content still peaking (Apr 15 deadline). FOMC T-2 spike window opening.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ build-v13 — FHE Crypto Guide 2026 + AI Agent Payments x402 Guide researched, written (~6,400 words combined), SEO-optimized (metadata, ArticleSchema, FAQSchema, internal links), scaffolded, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v13 — Design cycle ran (details in design report). Continuing OG image + UX work.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v29 — Community/social execution continuing through Apr 6 calendar. FOMC reactive templates ready.
SHIPPED ✅ eod refresh — Pipeline/blocker state confirmed unchanged.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock — ALL commits still blocked. 440+ modified files stuck. Every cycle that passes without resolution means more drift. rm .git/index.lock is a one-line fix. Assign: Programmer or direct Jefe action.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter 0/6 public API routes — FOMC is T-2 (Wed Mar 18). checkRateLimit() exists in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but is imported by ZERO routes. Traffic spike risk on /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. Now 12 consecutive cycles flagged.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Vercel trial ~4 days remaining — payment method must be added or site goes dark. Jefe action only.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P1] smart-wallets-guide-2026 in PUBLISH_QUEUE — page.tsx MISSING, blocking promotion. Blocks queue drain.

CARRY-OVER 🟡 PUBLISH_QUEUE at 5 items: smart-wallets (needs page.tsx), intent-dex (ready), restaking-avs (ready), fhe-crypto (ready), ai-agent-x402 (ready). 4 of 5 are promotion-ready pending git unblock.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 103/361 published slugs missing page.tsx (~28.5% returning 404). Persistent multi-cycle.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 structured-data.examples.ts — 40 TS errors (JSX in .ts file). Fix: rename to .tsx.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 defi-yields API route — only route without fallback data (returns 500 on error).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 next lint misconfigured (looking for ./lint directory).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Remove git index.lock NOW. With FOMC T-2 and Vercel trial expiring in ~4 days, every hour of delay compounds risk. Steps: (1) rm /path/to/.git/index.lock; (2) Review staged next.config.ts (preserve output:'standalone'); (3) Confirm or revert badges/courses deletions; (4) Stage all valid changes; (5) Commit + push → Vercel deploy. This unblocks the entire pipeline: rate limiter fix, smart-wallets page.tsx creation, queue promotion. Assign: degen-programmer immediate.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire checkRateLimit() to all 6 API routes. FOMC is Wednesday. The rate limiter is built and sitting idle in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts. This is a ~10-line change per route. Also add fallback data to /api/defi-yields (currently the only route that returns 500 on error). After git is unblocked, this ships in the same commit. Assign: degen-programmer.

PRIORITY 3 — Publish the 4 queue-ready guides in next publish cycle (Day 45): intent-based-dex-trading, restaking-avs-ecosystem, fhe-crypto-guide-2026, ai-agent-payments-x402 (after creating smart-wallets page.tsx for the 5th). These cover 5 distinct high-momentum narratives: MEV/intent, restaking $25B+ TVL, privacy/FHE (Zama mainnet), AI agent economy (Coinbase x402 + ERC-8004). Community threads for intent-dex (Apr 6) and restaking (Apr 5) are pre-scheduled — content must be live. Assign: degen-programmer (smart-wallets page.tsx) + degen-publish-queue (Day 45 batch).

STRATEGIC NOTE — Content velocity is strong: 2 guides/cycle throughout the day (build-v13 FHE + x402, build-v12 intent-dex + restaking, build-v11 prior). Next build candidates: Solana vs Ethereum 2026 comparison, DeFi Insurance Guide, Real World Assets (RWA) Deep Dive, Crypto ETF Comparison 2026 (timely post-Jan 2025 approvals). Three converging catalysts: FOMC T-2 (rate decision + crypto market volatility), Ethereum Pectra T-25 (Apr 10, EIP-7702 smart wallets), Tax deadline T-30 (Apr 15). Add Vercel payment method before T-4 days becomes T-0.
